parsed_review.summary: CP00-784 (Migration Platform failure fixture review bridge, risk C, 150 units, RP25.P07.M06.S01-RP25.P08.M02.S04) is a descriptor-only closeout pack whose production_ready claim is supported by implementation, tests, command evidence, and boundary enforcement. Verified: (1) Identity/binding consistent across manifest, review-baseline, contract projection (registry.js:485), plan live_state, and next-pack-queue (live_latest_pack_id=CP00-784); (2) Deliverable distribution {failure_recovery:60,security_audit:10,implementation:25,hermes_evidence:33,fixture:5,test:11,claude_review:6}=150 confirmed by direct count of baseline units and matched to MIGRATION_PLATFORM_CP784_REQUIREMENTS (registry.js:2213); micro-title (22/30/22/22/20/10/20/4), phase (116/34), and micro-phase counts also match; (3) createCaseSet/createDescriptor (service.js:227,267) build frozen descriptor rows with descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, no raw/source/credential/real-client payloads, and all *_runtime_opened=false, with authority_boundary {claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true, runtime_opening_pack_id:CP00-785}; (4) validators.js:2522/2550 enforce distribution, section rows, descriptor-only, no-leak guards, Hermes/Claude gates, read-only Claude packet, and handoff; (5) model.test.js:1065-1130 asserts coverage.errors=[], descriptor validation errors=[], runtime-closed flags, hermes.emits_runtime_receipt=false, claude.read_only=true, handoff to CP00-785, contract latest_projection=cp784 descriptor, and contract validation.valid=true; (6) command-evidence.json records 27 commands all exit_code 0, including all 10 required validation commands plus git diff --check, with no failures; (7) the CP178+ review hardening library (scripts/lib/closeout-pack-claude-review-hardening.mjs) correctly rejects auth failures, 0-byte stdout, malformed JSON, fenced JSON/prose, tool-call-shaped output, missing required fields, permission denials, and missing structured_output, and gates closeout eligibility on PASS/PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with p0/p1/p2=0; (8) Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer (not final approver), Hermes is used only as control-plane descriptor metadata (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false; no spawn/exec/fetch/http in product code), and no secrets/PII are present. No overclaim: manifest production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false, construction-inspection verdict=PENDING with descriptor_verified=false, all correctly gated on this review; command-evidence.production_ready=true is the established intra-pack command-gate field (identical pattern to closed CP00-783). One non-blocking P3 observation about changed-file-scope snapshot staleness is recorded. Enterprise-trust/human-final-approval authority remains outside this receipt as designed, so blocks_goal_closeout is false.

findings.title: changed-file-scope snapshot predates plan/queue regeneration; live-dirty plan files not captured
findings.details: The changed-file-scope.json git_status_rows (snapshot at 2026-06-15T18:43Z) does not list docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json or docs/closeout-pack-plan/next-pack-queue.json, both of which are modified in the working tree and are directly tied to CP00-784 (closeout-pack-plan.json live_state.pack_id=CP00-784; next-pack-queue.json live_latest_pack_id=CP00-784). They appear neither in active_pack_implementation_refs nor in unrelated_dirty_files_preserved. This is a point-in-time snapshot staleness: the scope artifact was generated before/independently of the 'npm run closeout-pack-plan:generate' step recorded in command-evidence.json, which dirties those governance/queue files. It is not a defect in the descriptor implementation, tests, or evidence, and no production_ready gate depends on it.
findings.recommendation: Optionally regenerate changed-file-scope.json after the plan/queue generation step so the snapshot reflects all pack-adjacent dirty files, or explicitly classify the plan/queue files (e.g., in unrelated_dirty_files_preserved or as governance state). Non-blocking.
findings.post_review_disposition: Does not block CP00-784 closeout. Informational provenance note only; pack-level production_ready remains correctly gated on this read-only review and subsequent adjudication.
